creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
I notice when switching  between 10.1 release and 10.1 stable that mouse sensitivity (for small movements) has changed somehow.

I think the acceleration for small movements is now too fast / non-existent. 

stable/10 - r281836

I have a G400s mouse with a high dpi. 

Please let me know what information I can provide to give better debug output.
